title: 大阪杯の後に・タマモクロスの予告

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Phew! That takes care of our first goal of the year.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: How did you find it, Trainer?
choice_data_list: I wasn't worried in the slightest.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, thank you. I guess this is what they call
"smooth sailing."

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Now I can take on the Takarazuka Kinen with my
head held high.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Tamtam! Thank you for coming to cheer me
on!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Well, I am your bestie. But friendship and races are two different things, ya hear?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Heh, I saw your—no, both you and your trainer's
weakness real clear today.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Yup! And you're not gonna get any better if ya
don't realize it!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Goodness! Will you tell me, Tamtam?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Say what?! Who just asks outta the blue like
that?!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Eh, whatevs. I'll show ya next time, right in front
of all your fans.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: A storm's brewin', so you better bring your umbrella! ...Not, like, a real storm, but... Whatever.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross leaves in an intimidating huff.
What could our weakness be?
